page_content:
1 See https://go.umd.edu/digitalstorytelling (https://go.umd.edu/ digitalstorytelling/) for an up-to-date list of approved courses.

2 Successful completion of the Digital Storytelling and Poetics minor requires the submission of a digital portfolio during a student's ﬁnal semester. This portfolio must be submitted electronically to the minor advisor at english@umd.edu by November 1 for fall semester graduation, April 1 for spring semester graduation, or August 1 for summer graduation. The portfolio must contain, at a minimum, the following material: 1. A welcome page

2. Five ﬁnished, polished texts produced by the student in Digital

Storytelling and Poetics minor courses, including a minimum of one critical essay and one creative work

3. A reflective essay that explains how these texts demonstrate the
